title: senna obovata
intro: Senna obovata, also known as the African senna, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and laxative effects due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna obovata include relief from constipation, as well as potential benefits for digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. Senna obovata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although it is also available in capsule or powder form for those who prefer a more concentrated dose.
